quality.completeness: Complete basic item data (name, type, rarity, description, attunement requirement).
quality.clarity: Description is clear, detailing movement mechanics, surface interaction, track prevention, difficult terrain negation, and forced march endurance.

mechanics.core_effect: Grants hovering 4 inches above the ground when affixed to a mount.
utility_benefits: Can move across/stand on nonsolid/unstable surfaces (water, lava).
mechanics.endurance_benefit: Grants 12 hours/day of normal speed movement without forced march exhaustion.
mechanics.limitations: Requires four shoes to be affixed to a horse or similar creature.
